rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix by rephrasing the abstract to remove overclaims and surface uncertainty.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for several clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the optimality of the threshold policy under every monotone utility.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors by making overconfident claims about the optimality of the threshold policy.
rationale.RX.5: The agent blends sources without traceability, as the rewrite does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
